notableEvents.label: Ildemaro Vargas GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ildemaro Vargas grounds into a double play, third baseman Kyle Karros to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman Willi Castro. Nolan Arenado out at 2nd. Ildemaro Vargas out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ildemaro Vargas rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ildemaro Vargas grounds into a double play, third baseman Kyle Karros to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman Willi Castro. Nolan Arenado out at 2nd. Ildemaro Vargas out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jose Fernandez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jose Fernandez flies out to center fielder Jake McCarthy.

notableEvents.label: Sterlin Thompson plunked
notableEvents.detail: Sterlin Thompson hit by pitch. Willi Castro to 3rd. Ezequiel Tovar to 2nd.
